mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, version, title, content, change_summary, operator_id, create_time, is_deleted FROM article_version WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY version DESC

SELECT id, article_id, version, title, content, change_summary, operator_id, create_time, is_deleted FROM article_version WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND version = #{version} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) FROM article_version WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(major_version), 0) FROM article_version WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_deleted = false
